name: Depth Anything V2
author: Guillaume
description: Depth estimation, point cloud generation, and mesh reconstruction using Depth Anything V2. Three chained nodes: image → depth map → point cloud → mesh. GPU acceleration when available.

params_schema.label: Model Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Larger variants produce sharper depth maps at the cost of speed and VRAM.

params_schema.label: Device
params_schema.tooltip: Select compute device. Auto-detect uses GPU when available.

params_schema.label: Focal Length (px)
params_schema.tooltip: Estimated focal length in pixels used for back-projection. Higher values compress depth range.

params_schema.label: Poisson Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Octree depth for Poisson surface reconstruction. Higher = more detail but slower and more memory.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count after mesh simplification. Set to -1 to disable simplification.
